prompt.chapter: fog-drenched cliffs and scattered ruins, quiet echoes, pressure building in still air, memories shaping in dust
prompt.page: inside a collapsed stone shelter at night, walls marked with repeated tower-like carvings, the carvings glow faintly as dust hangs frozen, the Wanderer sits tense in the silence
